items.title_en: U.S. crude oil posts biggest one-day drop since 2020 on U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement
items.title_zh: 根据美伊停火协议，美国原油价格创下2020年以来最大单日跌幅
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump agreed to the ceasefire with Iran after talks with Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在与巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫会谈后同意与伊朗停火。

items.title_en: Pirro's Powell probe faces a difficult road to appeal, former prosecutors say
items.title_zh: 前检察官说，皮罗的鲍威尔调查面临着艰难的上诉之路
items.desc_en: Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh may be in limbo while the legal process plays out.
items.desc_zh: 美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什（ Kevin Warsh ）可能在法律程序结束时陷入困境。

items.title_en: Rep. Ritchie Torres calls for probe into futures trades placed ahead March pause on Iran hostilities
items.title_zh: 众议员里奇·托雷斯（ Ritchie Torres ）呼吁对3月前暂停伊朗敌对行动的期货交易进行调查
items.desc_en: Oil and energy futures trading before President Donald Trump announced a pause in Iran attacks in March raises insider trading concerns, Torres told regulators.
items.desc_zh: 托雷斯告诉监管机构，在唐纳德·特朗普总统3月宣布暂停伊朗袭击之前，石油和能源期货交易引发了内幕交易担忧。

items.title_en: U.S. has violated ceasefire agreement, Iran parliamentary speaker says
items.title_zh: 伊朗议会议长说，美国违反了停火协议
items.desc_en: The two-week ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran appeared at risk of unravelling less than a day after it was announced.
items.desc_zh: 美国和伊朗之间为期两周的停火协议似乎在宣布后不到一天就面临解体的风险。

items.title_en: Dow surges 1,100 points as U.S.-Iran ceasefire sends oil prices tumbling: Live updates
items.title_zh: 随着美伊停火导致油价暴跌，道琼斯指数飙升1100点：实时更新
items.desc_en: Trump said the "double sided" ceasefire was contingent on Iran agreeing to an opening of the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示， “双面”停火取决于伊朗同意开放霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title_en: Gas prices should soon start slowly easing if ceasefire holds, analysts say
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，如果停火得以维持，天然气价格应该很快就会开始缓慢放缓
items.desc_en: With oil prices plunging after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire, gas prices at the pump might soon follow, at least for now.
items.desc_zh: 随着美国和伊朗同意停火两周后油价暴跌，该泵的天然气价格可能很快就会随之而来，至少目前是这样。

items.title_en: Buy these dividend stocks poised to raise payouts again, says Trivariate's Adam Parker
items.title_zh: Trivariate的Adam Parker表示，购买这些股息股有望再次提高派息
items.desc_en: With dividend yields not what they once were, investors should be choosing investments wisely in order to maximize returns, according to Trivariate Research.
items.desc_zh: 根据Trivariate Research的数据，由于股息收益率与过去不同，投资者应该明智地选择投资，以实现回报最大化。

items.title_en: Latest investigation of Bitcoin founder ties identity to Blockstream CEO Adam Back
items.title_zh: 对比特币创始人的最新调查将身份与Blockstream首席执行官Adam Back联系起来
items.desc_en: A report by the New York Times claims it has discovered the identity of the pseudonymous creator of Bitcoin known as Satoshi Nakamoto.
items.desc_zh: 《纽约时报》的一篇报道称，它已经发现了比特币的化名创造者中本聪的身份。

items.title_en: Bet on an Nvidia rally – and do it on the cheap – with this strategy, according to the charts
items.title_zh: 根据图表，用这种策略押注Nvidia的反弹–并以便宜的价格进行
items.desc_en: Shares of the chip giant are well below the all-time high, but an opportunity to bet on the next leg up has emerged.
items.desc_zh: 这家芯片巨头的股价远低于历史最高水平，但押注下一站的机会已经出现。

items.title_en: How to save money on flights as airlines raise prices
items.title_zh: 随着航空公司提高机票价格，如何节省机票费用
items.desc_en: Airlines are raising fares, adding fuel surcharges and increasing fees to check bags. Budget conscious travelers are wondering where to turn.
items.desc_zh: 航空公司正在提高票价，增加燃油附加费，并提高托运行李费。有预算意识的旅行者想知道该去哪里。

items.title_en: Fed officials still foresee rate cut this year, despite war impacts, minutes show
items.title_zh: 会议记录显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年将降息
items.desc_en: Policymakers said they would need to remain "nimble" as they weighed the impact the war had on inflation.
items.desc_zh: 政策制定者表示，在权衡战争对通货膨胀的影响时，他们需要保持“灵活”。

items.title_en: Jeff Shell leaves Paramount after allegations of SEC violations; company calls claims 'baseless'
items.title_zh: Jeff Shell在被指控违反美国证券交易委员会后离开派拉蒙；公司称索赔“毫无根据”
items.desc_en: Paramount President Jeff Shell is leaving his position after a lawsuit accused him of violating SEC rules.
items.desc_zh: 派拉蒙总裁杰夫·谢尔（ Jeff Shell ）在诉讼指控他违反美国证券交易委员会（ SEC ）规则后离职。

items.title_en: Many on Wall Street saw this 'TACO' coming as Trump's brinkmanship starts to lose grip on market
items.title_zh: 随着特朗普的边缘政策开始失去对市场的控制，华尔街的许多人看到了这种“玉米饼”的到来
items.desc_en: A growing cohort of investors has come to believe Trump's escalation tactics follow a familiar script.
items.desc_zh: 越来越多的投资者开始相信特朗普的升级策略遵循熟悉的脚本。

items.title_en: Microsoft developer tools executive Julia Liuson is retiring after 34 years
items.title_zh: 微软开发人员工具高管Julia Liuson在34年后退休
items.desc_en: When GitHub head Thomas Dohmke left last year, three top GitHub executives started reporting to her.
items.desc_zh: 当GitHub负责人托马斯·多姆克（ Thomas Dohmke ）去年离职时，三位GitHub高管开始向她汇报工作。

items.title_en: Meta debuts new AI model, attempting to catch Google, OpenAI after spending billions
items.title_zh: Meta推出新的人工智能模型，在花费数十亿美元后试图抓住谷歌、OpenAI
items.desc_en: Meta debuted its first major large language model, Muse Spark, spearheaded by chief AI officer Alexandr Wang, who leads Meta Superintelligence Labs.
items.desc_zh: Meta推出了第一个主要的大型语言模型Muse Spark ，由Meta Superintelligence Labs的首席人工智能官Alexandr Wang领导。

items.title_en: Anthropic gives our cyber stocks and other big tech names an AI stamp of approval
items.title_zh: Anthropic为我们的网络股和其他大型科技公司提供了人工智能批准印章
items.desc_en: Unlike past Anthropic announcements that resulted in cyber and tech selling, this one was a breath of fresh air.
items.desc_zh: 与过去导致网络和技术销售的人类公告不同，这次是呼吸新鲜空气。

items.title_en: Alphabet, Meta, Amazon, Nvidia lead tech rally after Trump announces ceasefire with Iran
items.title_zh: 在特朗普宣布与伊朗停火后， Alphabet、Meta、亚马逊、英伟达引领科技集会
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump's Iran ceasefire announcement provided some relief to Wall Street and tech stocks shared in the rally.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统的伊朗停火公告为华尔街和科技股提供了一些解脱。

items.title_en: The U.S. housing markets where million-dollar listings are standard
items.title_zh: 以百万美元出租为标准的美国房地产市场
items.desc_en: Nearly all of active listings in Nantucket, Massachusetts, cost at least $1 million.
items.desc_zh: 马萨诸塞州楠塔基特市几乎所有活跃房源的价格都至少为100万美元（ $ 100万）。

items.title_en: Markets shift back towards potential Fed rate cut this year with Iran ceasefire in place
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗停火，市场转向今年可能的美联储降息
items.desc_en: Odds for a reduction jumped Wednesday morning, hitting about 43%, according to the CME Group.
items.desc_zh: 芝加哥商品交易所集团(CME Group)的数据显示，周三上午降价的几率大幅上升，达到约43%。

items.title_en: Iran ceasefire, Delta earnings, the Navy's retail woes and more in Morning Squawk
items.title_zh: Morning Squawk的伊朗停火、Delta盈利、海军零售困境等
items.desc_en: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
items.desc_zh: 以下是投资者在开始交易日时需要了解的五个关键事项。

items.title_en: AI's next bottleneck: Why even the best chips made in the U.S. take a round trip to Taiwan
items.title_zh: 人工智能的下一个瓶颈：为什么即使是美国制造的最好的芯片也要往返台湾
items.desc_en: Nvidia has reserved the majority of TSMC’s most advanced packaging capacity. The lesser-known chipmaking step may become the next bottleneck for AI.
items.desc_zh: 英伟达保留了台积电大部分最先进的封装能力。鲜为人知的芯片制造步骤可能成为人工智能的下一个瓶颈。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta Air Lines, Levi Strauss, Exxon Mobil & more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票：达美航空、李维斯、埃克森美孚等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Countries around the world are considering teen social media bans – why experts warn it’s a ‘lazy’ fix
items.title_zh: 世界各国都在考虑禁止青少年使用社交媒体--为什么专家警告这是一个“懒惰”的解决方案
items.desc_en: "I think the argument for a ban is an admission of failure that we cannot regulate companies, so we can only restrict children," one expert told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: “我认为禁令的理由是承认失败，我们不能监管公司，所以我们只能限制儿童，”一位专家告诉CNBC。

items.title_en: Alibaba launches data center with 10,000 of its own chips as China ramps up AI push
items.title_zh: 随着中国加大人工智能推动力度，阿里巴巴推出拥有1万块自有芯片的数据中心
items.desc_en: Alibaba and China Telecom launched a data center in China designed for AI training and inferencing.
items.desc_zh: 阿里巴巴和中国电信在中国推出了一个专为人工智能培训和推理而设计的数据中心。

items.title_en: A fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire sparks market relief — but no clear path to lasting peace
items.title_zh: 脆弱的美伊停火引发市场缓解—但没有通往持久和平的明确道路
items.desc_en: The fragile ceasefire agreement is likely to face significant challenges, analysts told CNBC, citing a significant trust deficit on both sides.
items.desc_zh: 分析师告诉CNBC ，脆弱的停火协议可能面临重大挑战，理由是双方都存在严重的信任赤字。

items.title_en: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
items.title_zh: Ray Dalio ：特朗普-习近平会晤将聚焦贸易、资本流动
items.desc_en: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting  between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
items.desc_zh: Bridgewater创始人Ray Dalio告诉CNBC ，他对下个月美国和中国总统会晤的结果持乐观态度。

items.title_en: Asian tech stocks surge as U.S.-Iran cease fire ease Hormuz disruption worries
items.title_zh: 亚洲科技股飙升，美伊停火缓解霍尔木兹中断担忧
items.desc_en: Shares of Asian tech and semiconductor comoanies surged on the news that the U.S. and Iran agreed to a conditional two-week ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 美国和伊朗同意有条件停火两周的消息传出，亚洲科技和半导体公司股价飙升。

items.title_en: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says 'AI shift' opens opportunities to invest in startups
items.title_zh: 谷歌首席执行官桑达尔·皮查伊（ Sundar Pichai ）表示， “人工智能转变”为投资初创公司提供了机会
items.desc_en: Alphabet is in investor in some of the highest-valued private companies, including SpaceX, Anthropic and Stripe.
items.desc_zh: Alphabet是一些价值最高的私营公司的投资者，包括SpaceX、Anthropic和Stripe。

items.title_en: Elon Musk seeks ouster of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman as part of lawsuit
items.title_zh: 伊隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）寻求罢免OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥尔特曼（ Sam Altman ） ，
items.desc_en: Elon Musk is seeking to have OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman removed from their roles as officers in the company as part of a lawsuit.
items.desc_zh: 作为诉讼的一部分，埃隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）正在寻求将OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥尔特曼（ Sam Altman ）和总裁格雷格·布罗克曼（ Greg Brockman ）从公司

items.title_en: Is it time to buy tech, again? A flurry of good news from Broadcom may hold the answer
items.title_zh: 又到了收购科技的时候了吗？来自Broadcom的一连串好消息可能就是答案
items.desc_en: That's the question investors have been asking since the relief rally on the final trading day of March.
items.desc_zh: 这是自3月最后一个交易日的救济反弹以来投资者一直在问的问题。

items.title_en: Anthropic limits Mythos AI rollout over fears hackers could use model for cyberattacks
items.title_zh: 人为限制Mythos AI的推出，克服了黑客可能使用模型进行网络攻击的担忧
items.desc_en: Microsoft, Amazon, Apple, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto Networks and others will use the model as part of a new cybersecurity initiative called Project Glasswing.
items.desc_zh: 微软、亚马逊、苹果、CrowdStrike、Palo Alto Networks等公司将使用该模型作为名为Project Glasswing的新网络安全计划的一部分。

items.title_en: AWS teams working around the clock to keep Middle East services up after drone strikes, CEO says
items.title_zh: 首席执行官表示， AWS团队全天候工作，以在无人机袭击后保持中东服务正常运行
items.desc_en: The Iran war has hit Amazon data centers in the region, and the company is working around the clock on availability, cloud chief Matt Garman said.
items.desc_zh: 云计算主管马特·加曼（ Matt Garman ）表示，伊朗战争已经袭击了该地区的亚马逊数据中心，该公司正在全天候处理可用性问题。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Broadcom, UnitedHealth, Casey's General Stores and more
items.title_zh: 股票在盘前走势最大： Broadcom、UnitedHealth、Casey's General Stores等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是早期交易中波幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Upstart Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here’s what they learned
items.title_zh: 新兴华尔街研究公司表示，它已派遣一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。以下是他们学到的知识
items.desc_en: Citrini Research said it dispatched an analyst to Oman's Musandam Peninsula, where he traveled by boat to observe shipping activity firsthand.
items.desc_zh: Citrini Research表示，它派遣一名分析师前往阿曼的穆桑丹半岛，在那里他乘船前往观察航运活动。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Netflix, Soleno Therapeutics, Strategy & more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票： Netflix、Soleno Therapeutics、Strategy等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙（ Jamie Dimon ）在年度信函中列举了地缘政治、人工智能和私人市场的风险
items.desc_en: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙（ Jamie Dimon ）在给股东的年度信中指出，摩根大通成立250周年，并呼吁对美国的理想做出广泛的承诺。

items.title_en: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
items.title_zh: 美国3月就业人数增加17.8万人，高于预期；失业率为4.3%
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
items.desc_zh: 预计3月份非农就业人数将增加59,000人，失业率保持在4.4%。

items.title_en: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.title_zh: Blue Owl在陡峭的请求水平后将私人信贷资金赎回上限定为5%
items.desc_en: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.desc_zh: Blue Owl将高于平常的要求归因于“市场对软件公司人工智能相关中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title_en: The March jobs report will be released on Friday. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 3月份的就业报告将于周五发布。接下来会发生什么
items.desc_en: The U.S. economy is projected to show job gains of 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
items.desc_zh: 预计3月份美国经济将增加59,000个就业岗位，失业率保持在4.4%。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Exxon Mobil, Carnival, Delta, General Motors and more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票：埃克森美孚（ Exxon Mobil ）、嘉年华（ Carnival ）、达美（ Delta ）、通用汽车（ General
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前市场上涨幅度最大的股票。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Eli Lilly, Hasbro, Philip Morris, Intel, Micron & more
items.title_zh: 股市午间波动最大：礼来、孩之宝、菲利普莫里斯、英特尔、美光等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是中午交易中涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
items.title_zh: ADP表示， 3月私营部门招聘总人数为62,000人，好于预期
items.desc_en: Private sector employment growth kept pace, but health care and construction continued to provide nearly all the momentum.
items.desc_zh: 私营部门就业增长保持同步，但医疗保健和建筑业继续提供几乎所有的动力。

items.title_en: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.desc_en: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.desc_zh: Visa的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大推动力的一部分。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Nike, RH, Sandisk & more
items.title_zh: 股票在盘前走势最大：耐克、RH、桑迪斯克等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Nike, Dave & Buster's, RH and more
items.title_zh: 下班后股市走势最大：耐克、戴夫和巴斯特、RH等
items.desc_en: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.
items.desc_zh: 查看哪些股票在铃声过后出现大幅波动。

items.title_en: While low-income consumers struggle with rising gas prices, higher earners grow nervous as markets fall
items.title_zh: 虽然低收入消费者难以应对汽油价格上涨，但随着市场下跌，高收入者会变得紧张
items.desc_en: Bank of America data reveals lower-income consumers are already pulling back on spending. Consumer sentiment shows higher earners are feeling less confident.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行的数据显示，低收入消费者已经开始减少支出。消费者情绪表明，收入较高的人感觉不太自信。

items.title_en: Why $4 a gallon gas prices won’t trigger Fed interest rate hikes — and could lead to cuts
items.title_zh: 为什么每加仑汽油价格4 $不会引发美联储加息—并可能导致降息
items.desc_en: While there's still plenty of uncertainty about where rates are headed, Wall Street commentary shifted back to expectations for cuts.
items.desc_zh: 虽然利率走向仍存在很大的不确定性，但华尔街的评论又回到了降息的预期。

items.title_en: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，伊朗核弹将使避免核灾难变得更加困难
items.desc_en: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
items.desc_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司董事长表示，越来越多的核武国家从根本上改变了全球风险格局。

items.title_en: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
items.title_zh: 中国供应商警告说，由于霍尔木兹海峡关闭，美国人的价格会上涨
items.desc_en: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争阻碍了通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油及其产品的运输，引发了中国制造商对供应链中断的担忧。

items.title_en: New fees, fewer flights: Higher fuel prices pinch consumer budgets beyond the gas pump
items.title_zh: 新的费用，更少的航班：更高的燃油价格使消费者的预算超出了加油站的范围
items.desc_en: As corporate policies change, Americans will feel higher oil prices in their wallets beyond the gas pump.
items.desc_zh: 随着企业政策的变化，美国人将在加油站以外的钱包中感受到更高的油价。

items.title_en: Markets now see the Fed's next move as a potential rate hike as inflation fears mount
items.title_zh: 随着通胀担忧加剧，市场现在将美联储的下一步行动视为潜在的加息
items.desc_en: Traders in the futures market shifted the probability of a rate increase by the end of 2026 to 52% on Friday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周五上午，期货市场的交易员将2026年底加息的可能性提高到52%。

items.title_en: China industrial profits surge 15% to start year, but oil price shock threatens outlook
items.title_zh: 中国工业利润年初飙升15% ，但油价冲击威胁前景
items.desc_en: Soaring energy prices are expected to impact China's economy less than most other countries, due to its massive oil reserves and alternative energy sources.
items.desc_zh: 由于其庞大的石油储量和替代能源，预计能源价格飙升对中国经济的影响将小于其他大多数国家。

items.title_en: Global forecasting group sees U.S. inflation at 4.2% this year, much higher than Fed estimate
items.title_zh: 全球预测组织认为，今年美国通胀率为4.2% ，远高于美联储的估计
items.desc_en: The forecast is a sharp step up from the prior projection of 2.8%. Moreover, it is much higher than the 2.7% Fed officials estimated.
items.desc_zh: 该预测比之前预测的2.8%大幅上升。此外，它远高于美联储官员估计的2.7%。

items.title_en: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
items.title_zh: 随着经济显示出表面下的裂缝，华尔街的经济衰退几率攀升
items.desc_en: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.
items.desc_zh: 由于地缘政治风险的不确定性加剧和劳动力市场暴跌，经济学家提高了对经济萎缩的风险评估。

items.title_en: Don't be fooled by the UK's pre-war inflation print — a 'brutal' surge could be coming
items.title_zh: 不要被英国战前的通胀印记所愚弄— “残酷”的激增可能即将到来
items.desc_en: The U.K. inflation rate stood firm at 3% in February, according to the latest figures from the Office for National Statistics (ONS).
items.desc_zh: 根据国家统计局（ ONS ）的最新数据， 2月份英国通货膨胀率稳定在3%。

items.title_en: White House to pay TotalEnergies $1 billion to kill off East Coast wind farm projects
items.title_zh: 白宫向道达尔能源支付10亿美元（ $ 10亿） ，以扼杀东海岸风电场项目
items.desc_en: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.
items.desc_zh: 这一消息发布之际，伊朗战争扰乱了全球石油和天然气供应，使美国开发液化天然气资源变得更加紧迫。

items.title_en: Elizabeth Warren demands answers on costs, economic impact of 'illegal and reckless war'
items.title_zh: 伊丽莎白·沃伦（ Elizabeth Warren ）要求回答“非法和鲁莽的战争”的成本和经济影响
items.desc_en: The liberal Democratic firebrand ripped President Donald Trump, whom she said has 'dragged the United States into an illegal and reckless war.'
items.desc_zh: 自由民主党的煽动者撕裂了唐纳德·特朗普总统，她说唐纳德·特朗普“将美国拖入了一场非法和鲁莽的战争”。
